articles.title: PowerPoint punishment sent users into an infinite loop after lunch
articles.snippet: There was only one ESC from sneaky screenshots and fake BSODs Who, Me?  Welcome to another instalment of Who, Me? It's The Register's Monday column that shares your stories of mistakes, occasional malice, and how you came out the other side.…
articles.ai_summary: A PowerPoint glitch caused users to get stuck in an infinite loop after a lunch break, leading to frustration and confusion. This incident highlights the potential pitfalls of software reliability.
articles.why_it_matters: Demonstrates the importance of software stability in professional tools.

articles.title: My new favorite AirTag alternative fits perfectly in my wallet - and is seriously durable

articles.why_it_matters: Highlights the central role of AI in shaping future technology landscapes.

articles.title: Is AI Cannibalizing Human Intelligence? A Neuroscientist's Way to Stop It

In the Wall Street Journal Ming shares her experiment about …
